stemHtml: Resignation is a hazardous attitude due to the fact that...

options.a: it can influence the crew member who is resigned to have a hope for the future actions.
options.b: it can have a negative effect over the self-esteem of the crew.
options.c: it will influence the other crew members not to think about their actions in the future.
options.d: the crew can have a bad behavior afterwards.
